mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.status = 'NORMAL'

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT * FROM t_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, permission_id ASC
SELECT * FROM t_permission WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
